prompt: A candid, photorealistic outdoor portrait of a young East Asian woman standing on a sunlit street or plaza, framed from mid-thigh upward, with a softly blurred background showing a food stall or kiosk and a few indistinct people. She has a neat short bob haircut in dark brown with a side part, and she faces the camera in a relaxed upright pose. Her outfit consists of 2 visible clothing layers: a fitted ribbed turtleneck knit top in pale blue underneath a sleeveless A-line pinafore mini dress in light beige, with broad shoulder straps, 2 decorative round buttons at the strap attachments, and a prominent full-length front zipper with a ring pull. In one hand she holds 1 long churro in a tall white paper sleeve printed vertically with orange Japanese text reading チュロス and a small orange snack illustration near the bottom. Warm afternoon golden-hour lighting, shallow depth of field, creamy bokeh, natural skin tones, soft shadows, realistic fabric texture, fashion-street-snapshot aesthetic, high detail, DSLR-style portrait photography.
